touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Abigail Patel at AtlasInsights. No answer, left voicemail introducing our onboarding automation solution for CS teams.
LinkedIn connection request sent to Abigail Patel with note about helping PropTech companies automate customer onboarding workflows.
Follow-up LinkedIn message referencing common challenges in CS onboarding at similar-sized PropTech companies. No response received.
Initial cold email sent highlighting ROI of automating onboarding for Director of CS role. Shared case study from PropTech vertical. No response.
Follow-up email with different angle - referenced scaling challenges at 35-person companies and offered 15-minute exploratory call. No response.

Abigail responded to email confirming interest. Mentioned they're currently evaluating solutions and asked about our differentiation from Fathom. Brief exchange confirming pain points around manual onboarding workflows.

questions_asked.question: How do you differ from Fathom?
questions_asked.answer: We focus specifically on workflow automation vs just meeting intelligence - can automate entire onboarding sequences not just capture calls

touches.ai_summary: Pre-discovery email exchange. Abigail confirmed availability and shared that their team is manually managing onboarding for ~50 new customers per month. Asked about implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 2-3 weeks from contract signing to full rollout for teams your size

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for next week

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Abigail covering current onboarding process. Team of 6 CS reps manually handling 50+ onboardings monthly. Pain points: repetitive tasks, inconsistent follow-up, no visibility into onboarding health. Mentioned evaluating Fathom but needs more than call recording.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current onboarding workflow from contract signature to customer going live
questions_asked.answer: Manual email sequences, Slack reminders, spreadsheet tracking - very fragmented across tools

questions_asked.question: What's driving the evaluation now?
questions_asked.answer: Just closed Series A, scaling customer base, current process won't scale to 100+ onboardings per month

questions_asked.question: Can this integrate with our existing CRM and Slack?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, native integrations with all major CRMs and Slack for notifications

objections: Budget is tight post-fundraise, need to show clear ROI

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up discovery call diving into technical requirements and team structure. Abigail confirmed 6-seat requirement for CS team. Discussed reporting needs and workflow customization.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Kevin Sharma in RevOps handles procurement, but I own the decision for CS tools

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting and analytics do you provide?
questions_asked.answer: Full dashboard showing onboarding velocity, bottlenecks, time-to-value metrics, exportable to your BI tools

next_steps: Intro to Kevin Sharma for procurement

touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn message sent with ROI calculator and case study. No response - Abigail likely engaged via email channel.
Post-demo follow-up email. Abigail confirmed team loved the demo and wants to move forward. Asked about pricing for 6 seats with unlimited automation tier.

questions_asked.question: What's pricing for 6 seats on unlimited automation plan?
questions_asked.answer: Standard pricing is $6,750 annually - will send formal proposal with options

next_steps: Loop in Kevin for procurement review

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Abigail. Discussed standard pricing at $6,750 ACV. Abigail mentioned budget constraints and asked about flexibility. Competitor pricing from Fathom came up as reference point.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing given we're a startup?
questions_asked.answer: Let me check with leadership - what budget range are you working with?

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline to make a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Need to decide by end of quarter - evaluating Fathom at similar price point

objections: Pricing is higher than anticipated budget, need to be closer to $5k

touches.ai_summary: Quick pricing alignment call. Discussed revised proposal at $4,900 ACV (27% discount) to meet budget constraints. Abigail receptive but needs Kevin's approval on terms.

questions_asked.question: At $4,900 can we move forward this week?
questions_asked.answer: Need Kevin to review contract terms, but pricing works for our budget

touches.ai_summary: Email exchange with Abigail regarding contract terms. Kevin reviewing procurement details. Asked about payment terms and contract length flexibility. Confirmed annual commitment required for discounted rate.

questions_asked.question: Can we do quarterly payments instead of annual upfront?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, can structure as quarterly billing at same annual rate

touches.ai_summary: Final alignment meeting with Abigail and Kevin to review contract. Kevin had questions about data security and compliance. Discussed implementation timeline and success metrics. Abigail pushing to close but noted exec team hasn't been directly involved in evaluation.

questions_asked.question: What are your SOC 2 and GDPR compliance certifications?
questions_asked.answer: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, full documentation available in security portal

questions_asked.question: Should we include your VP or exec team in final sign-off?
questions_asked.answer: Not necessary - I have approval authority for CS tools at this price point

questions_asked.question: What's the cancellation policy after year one?
questions_asked.answer: 30-day notice required, no penalties after initial 12-month term

objections: Want confirmation we can scale seats mid-contract as team grows
next_steps: Target signature by end of week
